case_title: RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ ET AL VS. VALJEAN HARDEN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, RAYMOND LINDSTROM JR, CARL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDEN, VALJEAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $137.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,137.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, RAYMOND LINDSTROM JR, CARL A. AS TO DEFENDANT HARDEN, VALJEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, RAYMOND LINDSTROM JR, CARL A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HARDEN, VALJEAN HEARING SET FOR MAR-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINDSTROM JR, CARL A.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, RAYMOND LINDSTROM JR, CARL A.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE MAILED TO RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ ON 02/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY VALJEAN HARDEN IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAR-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2018 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JAN-16-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CARL LINDSTROM JR. APPEARANCE BY RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ. DEFENDANT VALJEAN HARDEN DID NOT APPEAR. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $87.50 SERVED NOV-13-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARDEN, VALJEAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CARL LINSTROM, JR. DEFENDANT VALJEAN HARDEN DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFFS STIPULATED TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ ON 1/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ ON 4/2/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ ON 12/12/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINDSTROM JR, CARL A.

SMALL CLAIMS MOTION TO VACATE HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 27, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ ONLY, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY VALJEAN HARDEN IS ALSO PRESENT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE ARGUMENTS, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, RAYMOND LINDSTROM JR, CARL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARDEN, VALJEAN $772.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $772.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
